---
name: Bug report
about: Report a USB access, driver, NAT, or detection problem
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran HolyConnect as Administrator
- [ ] I connected the Pi to the DATA port
- [ ] I checked the README FAQ
- [ ] I attached the diagnostics package or log file

## Environment

- Pi model:
- Hotspot board:
- Pi-Star version:
- Windows version:
- Extra networking software: Hyper-V / WSL / Docker / VPN / none

## What Happened

Describe the failure as clearly as possible.

## What You Expected

Describe the expected result.

## Files

- Diagnostics package:
- Log file:

## Notes

Anything else that may matter, including whether Windows asked for a manual RNDIS driver install.
